Based on your framework analysis:

**Best CC:**
AAPL $280 strike, 2025-06-18, 54 DTE, $7.25/$7.35 bid/ask, 0.39 delta, 18.3% annualized return (existing position)

**Best LEAPS:**
None qualifying - all showing expensive IVP (58-90%) with poor timing signals or trend warnings

None available

Elevated volatility across the board (58-93% IVP) - favorable for selling premium but expensive for buying LEAPS; focus on income strategies over directional bets.
